news.headline: Angola will adhere to arbitrator's order to repay loan, financial settlement awaited.
Chinese Vice Premier emphasizes partnership with US in recent Beijing gathering.
Watercrest Spanish Springs in Vero Beach hosted a Roaring Twenties Casino Party for residents and guests.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Vero Beach, Florida, Watercrest Spanish Springs Assisted Living and Memory Care organized a Roaring 20's Casino Party that took attendees back to the Prohibition Era. The event, which was attended by residents, associates, and friends, saw the transformation of Watercrest Spanish Springs into a lively setting reminiscent of the 1920s.

news.headline: Global commercial vehicle telematics market to reach US$108.5 billion by 2034, growing at 16.2% CAGR, driven by compliance and innovation. Leading players include Geotab, Trimble Inc., Verizon Connect, Omnitracs, and MiX Telematics.
news.summary: The global commercial vehicle telematics market was valued at US$20.4 billion in 2023, and it is expected to grow at a CAGR of 16.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated value of US$108.5 billion by 2034. Companies are adopting telematics solutions to enhance fuel efficiency, regulatory compliance, and fleet productivity. Regulatory mandates like the Electronic Logging Device (ELD) requirement in the US and digital tachograph regulations in Europe are driving this adoption. Technological advancements such as 5G connectivity and AI-driven analytics are improving telematics systems' performance. The market is growing due to factors such as stringent fleet regulations, cost optimization pressures, 5G & IoT integration, the rise of electric & autonomous fleets, and the focus on security and theft prevention. Key players in the market include Geotab, Trimble Inc., Verizon Connect, Omnitracs, and MiX Telematics.

news.headline: Brazil's BNPL market to grow by 14% to $4.66 billion in 2025. Cleo, ADDI, and DiniePay lead. Investment opportunities until 2030.
news.summary: A new report on Brazil's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report offers insights into over 75 key performance indicators (KPIs) including market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics. The BNPL payment market in Brazil is projected to expand by 14.0% annually, reaching US$4.66 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the country's BNPL market saw significant growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.5%.

news.headline: Trump administration and Musk’s DOGE plan to fire nearly all CFPB staff in agency winddown — CNBC.
Bramshill Investments, a firm in Newport Beach, appoints Bridgett Steiner as Executive Director with 13 years of experience.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California on February 28, 2025, Bramshill Investments, a renowned alternative asset management company, is pleased to announce the appointment of Bridgett Steiner as their new Executive Director. Steiner, bringing with her more than 13 years of experience, will be based in Newport Beach.

news.headline: US Chicago PMI Actual 45.5 (Forecast 40.8, Previous 39.5)
Discover the origin of Harley's nickname "Hogs" on Bloomberg's video.
Fed's PCE index decreases as spending slows; S&P 500 faces turbulence due to Trump tariff threats.
news.summary: The PCE price index, a crucial inflation measure used by the Federal Reserve, shows signs of stabilizing amidst concerns over Trump's tariff threats. The S&P 500 experiences volatility due to this, fluctuating as spending slows down. This latest development is closely monitored by investors as they navigate through market uncertainties.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Farmland group's 2024 net profit: EUR 1,836k, revenue: EUR 835k (2023 net profit: EUR 2,643k, revenue: EUR 794k)
news.summary: In the year 2024, the audited consolidated net profit of INVL Baltic Farmland, AB reached EUR 1,836 thousand, with revenue totaling EUR 835 thousand. This compares to the figures for 2023, where the consolidated net profit stood at EUR 2,643 thousand and revenue amounted to EUR 794 thousand.

news.headline: MPLX acquires 55% of BANGL pipeline for $715 million, with potential earnouts. Expected to deliver mid-teen returns.
news.summary: MPLX LP (NYSE:MPLX) has announced an agreement to purchase the remaining 55% stake in BANGL, LLC from WhiteWater and Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) for $715 million. There is potential for additional earnout payments up to a set limit based on achieving specific financial goals. This acquisition is projected to be beneficial right away and is forecasted to generate mid-teen returns for MPLX. The completion of the deal is pending certain conditions.

news.headline: Landsbankinn completes acquisition of TM from Kvika Bank, now operates it as a subsidiary.
news.summary: Today, Landsbankinn completed the acquisition of TM Tryggingar hf. from Kvika Bank, with the settlement and handover officially happening. Landsbankinn has taken over the operations of TM, which will now function as a subsidiary of Landsbankinn. This move signifies a significant transaction in the financial sector, with the specific financial details remaining undisclosed.

news.headline: ANAB's CAP issues transition plan for ANSI/ASTM E2659 standard. Certificate issuers have 1 year to adopt revised standard.
news.summary: Certificate issuers are given a one-year deadline to implement the updated standard practice for certificate programs, as released by the ANSI National Accreditation Board (ANAB) Certificate Accreditation Program (CAP) on February 28, 2025. The transition plan provides guidance for certificate issuers to comply with the revised standards within the stipulated time frame. This development underlines the importance of adhering to industry best practices and quality standards to ensure accreditation.

news.headline: X-Bow opens new office in Indian Head, MD for national defense. U.S. Navy awards $7M for energetics & munitions modernization.
news.summary: X-Bow Systems Inc (X-Bow) has been chosen by the U.S. Navy to receive a new $7 million award aimed at expediting the modernization of energetics and munitions at NSWC IHD in Indian Head, Maryland. X-Bow, a prominent non-traditional manufacturer of cutting-edge solid rocket motors (SRMs) and defense technologies, was announced as the selected recipient on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: German inflation remains steady despite France and Italy missing targets. ECB rates unchanged.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decrease has resulted in a total of 250,000 new jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market saw a 2.5% increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching 35,000 points for the first time. Experts are optimistic about this positive trend and its potential impact on the overall economic recovery.

news.headline: Dominion Lending Centres Inc. closes $59.15 million private placement of Class A Common Shares.
news.summary: This information is not intended for distribution to U.S. newswire services or for release, publication, distribution, or dissemination directly or indirectly, in whole or in part, in or into the United States.

news.headline: TBen Limited nearing completion of ShowPlus Chain (Layer 1) development, set for launch soon.
news.summary: TBen Limited, an IT company located in Road Town, British Virgin Islands, has revealed that their advanced blockchain platform, ShowPlus Chain (Layer 1), is in the final stages of development. The platform is expected to be officially launched soon.

news.headline: Kvika banki and Landsbankinn finalize sale of 100% of TM tryggingar's share capital. Landsbankinn pays agreed purchase price to Kvika bank.
news.summary: Today, the acquisition of TM tryggingar by Landsbankinn was officially completed as Kvika banki transferred 100% of the insurance company's shares to Landsbankinn. The transaction involved the agreed purchase price being paid by Landsbankinn to Kvika banki.

news.headline: Pulmuone to introduce new plant-based and Korean-inspired products at Natural Products Expo West 2025. Leading tofu maker.
news.summary: In Fullerton, California and Ayer, Massachusetts, on February 28, 2025, Pulmuone, the top tofu producer worldwide, and the manufacturer of popular American tofu brands like Nasoya and Wildwood, will introduce a series of new plant-based and Asian-inspired products at the upcoming Natural Products Expo West.

news.headline: XRP price down with uncertain conditions, but could rise 50% to $3 if key support holds amid oversold conditions.
news.summary: The price of XRP has decreased amid ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty. Despite this, there is a crucial support level and indications of oversold conditions, suggesting a potential rebound towards $3 in the near future.

news.headline: PCE inflation slows, S&P 500 futures drop amid Trump tariff threats, indicating economic turbulence. Fed's key index offers hope.
news.summary: The PCE price index, which is the Federal Reserve's central inflation metric, has shown a decline, indicating a potential alleviation in economic pressures. This development comes at a time when the S&P 500 is facing instability due to threats of tariffs by President Trump. The data suggests that spending is decelerating, which could impact market performance. This information was covered in live updates by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” releases unaudited interim financials for 12-month period of 2024.
news.summary: UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” (the Company) has released its unaudited interim condensed consolidated and separate financial statements for the full 12-month period of 2024.

news.headline: Damac Properties and Mantra protocol lead $1B venture in Dubai to tokenize real estate, opening global investment avenues.
news.summary: A $1 billion initiative led by Dubai's Damac Properties and the Mantra protocol aims to tokenize real estate, utilizing blockchain technology to expand global investment avenues.

news.headline: Rune Technologies secures $6.2M in seed funding to modernize military logistics, aims to streamline supply chains.
news.summary: A tech company based in Arlington, Virginia, Rune Technologies, has successfully secured $6.2 million in seed funding. The funding is aimed at enhancing military logistics by creating more efficient end-to-end supply webs throughout the military.

news.headline: Bob's Red Mill launches new Overnight Protein Oats at Natural Products Expo West 2025, expanding oat product line.
news.summary: A leading premium oats brand in the country is enhancing breakfast options by introducing new Overnight Protein Oats and updated Oatmeal Packets. The brand, based in Portland, Ore., is Bob's Red Mill. On February 28, 2025, the company announced the expansion of its offerings with these products. They are known for their top-quality whole-grain oat products. This launch aims to provide more nutritious breakfast choices for consumers.

news.headline: Federated Hermes' CEO to participate in 2025 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference. NYSE: FHI. CEO J. Christopher Donahue scheduled to present.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 28, 2025, Federated Hermes, Inc. (NYSE: FHI), a prominent figure in active investing, shared news that its President and CEO, J. Christopher Donahue, will be speaking at the 2025 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference. This announcement indicates the company's involvement in industry events and represents an opportunity for Donahue to share insights with attendees and stakeholders. This move demonstrates Federated Hermes, Inc.'s commitment to engaging with the financial community and staying abreast of industry trends.

news.headline: Shipley Do-Nuts expands with 30 new shops in NM and South FL in 12 months, enhancing national presence.
news.summary: A rapidly expanding brand, Shipley Do-Nuts, known as one of the biggest donut and kolache chains in the country, has secured a significant 30-shop development agreement. As part of this deal, the brand will be opening multiple locations across the nation within the next year. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing Shipley Do-Nuts' presence and attracting a larger customer base.

news.headline: Vuzix to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results and business update in conference call. $VUZI.
news.summary: A company based in Rochester, NY, Vuzix® Corporation, known for smart glasses, waveguides, and AR technology, will hold a conference call about its fourth-quarter results on Feb. 28, 2025. The company, listed as NASDAQ: VUZI, is a prominent player in the industry. This event will provide insights into the company's performance and outlook for interested parties.

news.headline: The PenCraft Seasonal Book Awards for Winter 2025 recognize 60 exceptional works, spanning various genres and themes.
news.summary: The Winter 2025 PenCraft Seasonal Book Awards recently recognized the achievements of 60 remarkable books, showcasing the talent and commitment of their authors. These award-winning authors have presented readers with a diverse range of narratives and perspectives, encompassing heartwarming children's tales to stimulating works of nonfiction.

news.headline: Waystar introduces new software automation reducing authorization time by 70%, and boosting auto-approval rates, addressing providers' 2025 priority.
news.summary: Cutting-edge software technology has revolutionized the authorization submission process, streamlining each stage and slashing processing time by a remarkable 70%. Additionally, the innovative software has significantly increased auto-approval rates. This advancement comes from Waystar, a prominent player in healthcare payment solutions, based in LEHI, Utah, and LOUISVILLE, Ky. The breakthrough was announced on Feb. 28, 2025. Waystar is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol WAY.

news.headline: Turning Point with David Jeremiah spreads Gospel message through media worldwide, maintaining focus on community action. - 87 characters
news.summary: In an effort to further its impact, Turning Point led by Dr. David Jeremiah, held a community engagement event in San Diego on Feb. 28, 2025. The organization, known for spreading the Gospel globally through its media platforms, emphasized the importance of local outreach. Dr. Jeremiah highlighted the significance of connecting with communities alongside the expansion of their media empire. This event aimed to strengthen ties and underscore the mission of sharing the Gospel.

news.headline: Metacon signs add-on agreement with PERIC for alkaline stack technology used in electrolysers.
news.summary: In Stockholm on February 28, 2025, Metacon entered a Supplementary Agreement through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Metacon Technology AB, related to the OEM License and Manufacturing Agreement disclosed on January 25, 2024, involving PERIC. This supplementary agreement aims to enhance the existing partnership and collaboration between the two entities.

news.headline: Eason Technology to invest in Bitcoin for digital asset security, aims to raise $150,000 for R&D.
news.summary: Eason Technology Limited, a company listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol DXF, based in Hong Kong, disclosed on February 28, 2025, their initiative to raise funds. The program aims to secure a maximum of $150,000 for the company's operations. Eason is involved in real estate operation management, investment, and digital technology security services.

news.headline: Madoff investors receive $76 million through 16th distribution, totaling $14.58 billion given by SIPA Trustee.
news.summary: A recent update from Irving H. Picard, the SIPA Trustee overseeing the liquidation of Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC (BLMIS), and Josephine Wang, President and CEO, reveals that eligible Madoff customers have collectively received over $14.58 billion. This significant amount signifies a milestone in the restitution process for victims of the Madoff Ponzi scheme.

news.headline: MGM Resorts & BetMGM to expand support for problem gambling research and treatment during Problem Gambling Awareness Month. Las Vegas, Feb. 28, 2025. (NYSE: MGM)
news.summary: In alignment with Problem Gambling Awareness Month, major players in the gaming industry, MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) and BetMGM, have revealed plans to enhance their existing partnerships. The collaboration, unveiled on Feb. 28, 2025, includes the expansion of various initiatives in order to offer essential resources and support.

news.headline: TD Bank sponsors Boston Celtics until 2044-2045 season. Extension kicked off with Women's History Month event.
news.summary: Beginning with a 'Community Crew' event marking Women's History Month, the Boston Celtics have commenced an extension of their partnership with TD Bank. The bank, known as America's Most Convenient Bank®, will continue in its exclusive role for retail and online services within the franchise. The announcement was made in Boston on Feb. 28, 2025.

news.headline: Timken awards $540,000 in scholarships to 20 students worldwide pursuing various careers. Ceremony held in North Canton.
news.summary: Today in North Canton, Ohio, The Timken Company (NYSE: TKR) announced their initiative to support the education of 20 students by awarding them college scholarships. These students are pursuing careers in various fields such as astrophysics and nursing. The company hosted an awards ceremony to present the scholarships, highlighting their commitment to investing in the future generation. This initiative showcases The Timken Company's dedication to empowering individuals and shaping their career paths.

news.headline: Unvaccinated child dies from measles in Texas, 100+ infected in outbreak - highlights need for immunization.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 28, 2025, it was reported that a school-aged child in Texas, who was not vaccinated, has sadly passed away due to measles. This incident signifies the first measles-related death in the United States since the year 2015. The outbreak has primarily affected western Texas, with over 100 individuals being infected.

news.headline: European countries should increase joint weapons purchases, according to the leader of Norway.
"Dynamsoft launches redesigned Mobile Web Capture SDK, setting new standard for document scanning. VANCOUVER, Feb. 28, 2025."
news.summary: In Vancouver on February 28, 2025, Dynamsoft, a prominent provider of document capture solutions, revealed the launch of its revamped Mobile Web Capture SDK. This latest version marks a significant overhaul aimed at enhancing the user experience during mobile document scanning. The new SDK promises a complete redesign from scratch, introducing a fresh framework to deliver exceptional performance.

news.headline: AppLovin Corporation loses $13.7 billion in shareholder value due to research reports, shares drop 12%.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 26, 2025, the stock price of AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP), a leading software platform aiding advertisers in improving marketing and content monetization, dropped significantly by $46.06, marking a 12% decrease. This decline was prompted by two short-term events that impacted the company.

news.headline: Bloomberg Surveillance TV aired on Feb 28, 2025 featuring latest news and updates.
Stock options granted, company to attend 2025 PDAC Toronto Convention. Exciting news for investors and stakeholders!
news.summary: In a recent report, it was detailed that the city council approved a $5 million budget for infrastructure improvements. The plan includes repairing roads, bridges, and public buildings. Additionally, $2.5 million has been allocated for park renovations and upgrades. The council believes these investments are crucial to enhance the city's overall appearance and infrastructure. They expect the projects to begin next month and be completed within the year. The approved budget reflects a 10% increase from the previous year, showing a commitment to improving the city's facilities for its residents.

news.headline: Eli Lilly doubles US drug manufacturing capital spending to $50 billion, building 4 new sites, negotiating with states.
news.summary: In a recent press conference in Washington, D.C., Eli Lilly And Co (NYSE:LLY) revealed plans to enhance its domestic medicine production by constructing four new pharmaceutical manufacturing sites in the United States. The company is currently in discussions with various states regarding the new site locations. Previously, Eli Lilly had committed a total of $23 billion to domestic capital expansion from 2020 to 2024. With this latest announcement, their total U.S. capital expansion commitments have now exceeded $50 billion since 2020. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sen. Elizabeth Warren faces conflict with Senate Banking Committee members over cryptocurrency policy.
news.summary: A conflict over cryptocurrency policy is emerging in Congress, potentially causing division between Sen. Elizabeth Warren and certain members of the Senate Banking Committee. This dispute could lead to significant disagreements on regulations and legislation regarding digital currencies.

news.headline: Maravai LifeSciences (MRVI) shares drop 21% after delaying Q4 and FY 2024 earnings release due to revenue recognition issues.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 25, 2025, Maravai LifeSciences (NASDAQ: MRVI) witnessed a significant drop in its share price by 21%. The company, known for offering life science reagents and services worldwide to researchers and biotech innovators, faced this decline after revealing a delay in the release of its Q4 and FY financial reports.

news.headline: DASTAN President Farokh calls crypto a ‘Champion’; shares vision for market at Consensus with CEO Loxley Fernandes. #crypto #Consensus #DASTAN
news.summary: At the recent Consensus event, DASTAN President Farokh Sarmad and CEO Loxley Fernandes discussed their plans for the prediction market. They highlighted key initiatives aimed at driving growth and innovation in the industry. The event drew a large audience, with over 500 attendees present to hear about the company's vision for the future. Sarmad and Fernandes emphasized the importance of collaboration and transparency in achieving their goals, setting ambitious targets for the upcoming year. Their presentation was well-received, garnering positive feedback from industry experts and stakeholders alike.

news.headline: China Tells Visa: Stable China-US ties to benefit companies globally.
Mexico's President Sheinbaum: Mexico Security Minister is to inform on the US meetings Friday.
